mapper.select:
select id, username, password, nickname, real_name, phone, email, union_id, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user
and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, nickname, real_name, phone, email, union_id, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{unionId}, #{status}, now(), now())
